zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip de Ridell於大約1079年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye37歲，母親Anne Bigod28歲。他於1109年與Christiana de Soulis在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德布萊也結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1126年在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾奧可南享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip de Ridell于大约1079年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye37岁，母亲Anne Bigod28岁。他于1109年与Christiana de Soulis在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德布萊也结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1126年在英国苏格兰洛包爾奧可南享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ridell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Siddall   or   Siddell  .
Possibly an altered form of German   Seidel  .

variants.name: Siddall
meanings: habitational name presumably from either Siddal in Middleton (Lancashire), or from Siddal in Southowram (Yorkshire). Both places appear to have been named with Old English sīd ‘large, spacious, long’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’; however, the surname is recorded earlier than either of the places.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philip de Ridell was born about 1079, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye, was 37 and his mother, Anne Bigod, was 28. He married Christiana de Soulis in 1109, in Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1126, in Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip de Ridell est né environ 1079, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Anne Bigod, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Christiana de Soulis en 1109, à Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1126, à Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip de Ridell um 1079 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye 37 und seine Mutter Anne Bigod 28. Er hat 1109 in Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Christiana de Soulis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1126 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Ridell è nato il circa 1079 nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Anne Bigod, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Christiana de Soulis nel 1109, nel Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1126, nel Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip de Ridellが約1079年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blayeは37歳，母Anne Bigodは28歳であった。1109年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドブレイでChristiana de Soulisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1126年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアオクスナムで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip de Ridell(이)가 대략 1079년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Bigod(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1109년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드 블레이에서 Christiana de Soulis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1126년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 스남에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Ridell nasceu aproximadamente 1079, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anne Bigod, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana de Soulis em 1109, em Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1126, em Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip de Ridell родился около 1079 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Bigod, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana de Soulis в 1109 г. в местности блеи, гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1126 г. в местности окснам, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip de Ridell nació aproximadamente 1079, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Anne Bigod, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Christiana de Soulis en 1109, en Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1126, en Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
